description: Booking contract for Rentars — manages rental bookings with overlap prevention, status transitions, escrow ID tracking, and per-property booking indexes.

functions.name: initialize
functions.description: Initialize the contract with an admin address. Must be called exactly once. Panics if already initialized.

inputs.name: admin
inputs.description: The Stellar address that will have admin privileges over booking status transitions and escrow management.

functions.name: create_booking
functions.description: Create a new booking for a property. Validates date ordering, positive price, and no overlapping active bookings. Returns the new booking ID.

inputs.name: tenant
inputs.description: The Stellar address of the tenant making the booking.

inputs.name: property_id
inputs.description: The on-chain property identifier being booked.

inputs.name: check_in
inputs.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) for the check-in date. Must be strictly less than check_out.

inputs.name: check_out
inputs.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) for the check-out date. Must be strictly greater than check_in.

inputs.name: total_price
inputs.description: Total booking price in USDC stroops (1 USDC = 10,000,000 stroops). Must be greater than 0.

outputs.description: The newly created booking ID (auto-incremented, starts at 1).

errors: Booking dates overlap with an existing booking

functions.name: cancel_booking
functions.description: Cancel a booking. Only the tenant who created the booking may cancel it. Panics if already cancelled or completed.

inputs.name: caller
inputs.description: Must match the tenant address on the booking.

inputs.name: booking_id
inputs.description: The ID of the booking to cancel.

functions.name: update_status
functions.description: Update the status of a booking. Only the admin may call this. Enforces valid state machine transitions: Pending→Confirmed|Cancelled, Confirmed→Completed|Cancelled. Cancelled and Completed are terminal states.

inputs.name: caller
inputs.description: Must be the admin address set during initialization.

inputs.name: booking_id
inputs.description: The ID of the booking to update.

inputs.name: new_status
inputs.description: The target status. Must be a valid transition from the current status.

functions.name: set_escrow_id
functions.description: Attach an off-chain escrow reference string to a booking. Only the admin may call this.

inputs.name: caller
inputs.description: Must be the admin address set during initialization.

inputs.name: booking_id
inputs.description: The ID of the booking to update.

inputs.name: escrow_id
inputs.description: Off-chain escrow reference identifier (e.g. a UUID or transaction hash).

functions.name: get_booking
functions.description: Retrieve a booking by its ID.

functions.name: get_property_bookings
functions.description: Return all booking IDs for a given property. Returns an empty list if the property has no bookings.

outputs.description: Ordered list of booking IDs associated with the property.

functions.name: check_availability
functions.description: Check whether a date range is available for a property (no active overlap). Cancelled bookings do not block availability.

outputs.description: true if the date range is available, false if it overlaps an active booking.

functions.name: booking_count
functions.description: Return the total number of bookings ever created (includes cancelled and completed).

outputs.description: Total bookings created since contract deployment.

BookingStatus.description: Lifecycle status of a booking. Cancelled and Completed are terminal states.

escrow_id.description: Off-chain escrow reference. Empty string until set by admin.

storage_keys.Admin: Address — admin address set during initialize()
storage_keys.Booking(u64): Booking — individual booking record keyed by booking ID
storage_keys.BookingCount: u64 — monotonic counter for booking ID generation
storage_keys.PropertyBookings(u64): Vec<u64> — list of booking IDs for a given property ID
